TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mo'e Peyongsi == Mo'e Peyongsi, o Cou finacadan (1912 miheca 4 folad 20 romi'ad ‚Äď 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad), ngangan to no Dipong ci Yama de no satori, o nano no Alisan i Ciayi ko kasofocan, malaimengay no Taywan ato mafadesay i kohacalay katalawan a tamdaw . Rayray no 'oripan O mama ni Mo'e Peyongsi ci Iusugu'e Peongsi, o ina i ci Paicu'e Niahosa; ira ko 2 salikaka to fa'inayan. Kalakapahan ni Mo'e Peyongsi ona tayraay i nano Taynanken Ciayi kenco a matayal, ta itira cingra i kakeridan a mapalahad. Ikor sato, minokay ci Mo'e Peyongsi itira i Lalauya niyaro'an imengan a mala misimaway, ikor nga'ay ko demak mapacakat a malaimeng. I 1935 mihecaan itiya, ciramod to Tfoya Cuana ngasaw niyaro'ay a fafahiyan ci (kowaping: Wang Qingzhi, Cou a ngangan ci Yangui'e Tiaki'ana, Dipong a ngangan: Tejima Kuniko, 1916 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad ‚Äď 2008 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad). Ikor no kararamod, itira sa i Lalauya niyaro' ko aro' tangasa 'ayaw picada no Komintang sifo to Taywan, madadoedo ci wawa to fa'inayan ci Wang Junli (1934), Wang Junxing (1938), Wang Juncheng (1940), Wang Zhimei (1943) 3 ko fa'inayan 1 ko fafahiyan a wawa. Ikor no picada no Komintang sifo to Taywan i, mapalinah ci Mo'e Peyongsi tayra i Alisan imengan a malaimeng ato mikapi to tayal to misokoliway. Ikor sato, malinah ci Mo'e Peyongsi tayra i Lalauya malaimeng, citodong mala singsi ato isingan ko tayal, nanoya malinah tayra i Ciayisienken imengci mala kakeridan misolapay; kaitiraan ningra a matayal i, padoedo ko kasofoc to wawa ci Wang Jungong (1945), Wang Yunmei (1948) aci Wang Huimeian. I 1952 mihecaan i, oya ca Mo'e Peyongsi, ci Uongu Yatauyogana, ci Yapasuyong Č Yulunana, ci Wu Yide, ci Du Xiaosheng aci Fang Yizhong mapakayra i "Goosanco fiedie panluanan" sanay ko pa'ilo, ikor mapakokot o nano Taywansen paoan silingpo kakeridan ci Lin Xiule o nano nisamawmawan patirengan a "Santi paoan huyi" sakapot i Ciayisi, mapolong mapatayra i Taypi Cinmi no sofitay a piliclican marofo. I 1954 miheca 2 folad 17 romi'ad, masetek ko pi'ilo; saka 4 folad 17 romi'ad, ca Mo'e Peyongsi, ci Uongu Yatauyogana, ci Yapasuyong Č Yulunana, ci Wu Yide, ci Du Xiaosheng aci Fang Yizhong maemin kowangan ko pipatay . Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi == mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi, o~u ¶o~uo~u~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan (**** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ), ŇčaŇčan to~u no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ¶i jama …¨~…ģ…ô no~u sato~uri, o~u nano~u no~u a…ĺisan i ¶iaji ko~u kaso~ufo~u ¶an, ma…ĺaim…ôŇčaj no~u tajwan ato~u mafa…¨~…ģ…ôsaj i ko~uńßa ¶a…ĺaj kata…ĺawan a tam…¨~…ģaw . rajraj no~u °o~uripan o~u mama ni mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi ¶i io~u~uso~u~u*o~u~u °…ô p…ôo~uŇčsi, o~u ina i ¶i pai ¶o~u~u °…ô niańßo~usa; ira ko~u * sa…ĺikaka to~u fa °inajan. ka…ĺakapańßan ni mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi o~una tajraaj i nano~u tajnank…ôn ¶iaji k…ôn ¶o~u a mataja…ĺ, ta itira ¶iŇčra i kak…ôri…¨~…ģan a mapa…ĺańßa…¨~…ģ. iko~ur sato~u, mino~ukaj ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi itira i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja nijaro~u °an im…ôŇčan a ma…ĺa misimawaj, iko~ur Ňča °aj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak mapa ¶akat a ma…ĺaim…ôŇč. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan itija, ¶iramo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tfo~uja ¶o~u~uana Ňčasaw nijaro~u °aj a fafańßijan ¶i (ko~uwapiŇč: waŇč *iŇč*ńßi, ¶o~uo~u~u a ŇčaŇčan ¶i jaŇčo~u~ui °…ô tiaki °ana, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a ŇčaŇčan: t…ôjima ko~u~uniko~u, **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ). iko~ur no~u kararamo~u…¨~…ģ, itira sa i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja nijaro~u ° ko~u aro~u ° taŇčasa °ajaw pi ¶a…¨~…ģa no~u ko~umintaŇč sifo~u to~u tajwan, ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ¶i wawa to~u fa °inajan ¶i waŇč *o~u~un…ĺi (****), waŇč *o~u~unxiŇč (****), waŇč *o~u~un ¶ńß…ôŇč (****), waŇč *ńßim…ôi (****) * ko~u fa °inajan * ko~u fafańßijan a wawa. iko~ur no~u pi ¶a…¨~…ģa no~u ko~umintaŇč sifo~u to~u tajwan i, mapa…ĺinańß ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi tajra i a…ĺisan im…ôŇčan a ma…ĺaim…ôŇč ato~u mikapi to~u taja…ĺ to~u miso~uko~u…ĺiwaj. iko~ur sato~u, ma…ĺinańß ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi tajra i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja ma…ĺaim…ôŇč, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ma…ĺa siŇčsi ato~u isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, nano~uja ma…ĺinańß tajra i ¶iajisi…ônk…ôn im…ôŇč ¶i ma…ĺa kak…ôri…¨~…ģan miso~u…ĺapaj; kaitiraan niŇčra a mataja…ĺ i, pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ko~u kaso~ufo~u ¶ to~u wawa ¶i waŇč *o~u~uŇčo~uŇč (****), waŇč jo~u~unm…ôi (****) a ¶i waŇč ńßo~u~uim…ôian. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan i, o~uja ¶a mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi, ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ¶i japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana, ¶i wo~u~u ji…¨~…ģ…ô, ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč a ¶i faŇč ji*ńßo~uŇč mapakajra i "*o~uo~usan ¶o~u fi…ô…¨~…ģi…ô pan…ĺo~u~uanan" sanaj ko~u pa °i…ĺo~u, iko~ur mapako~uko~ut o~u nano~u tajwans…ôn pao~uan si…ĺiŇčpo~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i …ĺin xio~u~u…ĺ…ô o~u nano~u nisamawmawan patir…ôŇčan a "santi pao~uan ńßo~u~uji" sakapo~ut i ¶iajisi, mapo~u…ĺo~uŇč mapatajra i tajpi ¶inmi no~u so~ufitaj a pi…ĺi ¶…ĺi ¶an maro~ufo~u. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mas…ôt…ôk ko~u pi °i…ĺo~u; saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ¶a mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi, ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ¶i japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana, ¶i wo~u~u ji…¨~…ģ…ô, ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč a ¶i faŇč ji*ńßo~uŇč ma…ômin ko~uwaŇčan ko~u pipataj . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: == Mo'e Peyongsi == Mo'e Peyongsi, o Cou finacadan (1912 miheca 4 folad 20 romi'ad ‚Äď 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad), ngangan to no Dipong ci Yama de no satori, o nano no Alisan i Ciayi ko kasofocan, malaimengay no Taywan ato mafadesay i kohacalay katalawan a tamdaw . Rayray no 'oripan O mama ni Mo'e Peyongsi ci Iusugu'e Peongsi, o ina i ci Paicu'e Niahosa; ira ko 2 salikaka to fa'inayan. Kalakapahan ni Mo'e Peyongsi ona tayraay i nano Taynanken Ciayi kenco a matayal, ta itira cingra i kakeridan a mapalahad. Ikor sato, minokay ci Mo'e Peyongsi itira i Lalauya niyaro'an imengan a mala misimaway, ikor nga'ay ko demak mapacakat a malaimeng. I 1935 mihecaan itiya, ciramod to Tfoya Cuana ngasaw niyaro'ay a fafahiyan ci (kowaping: Wang Qingzhi, Cou a ngangan ci Yangui'e Tiaki'ana, Dipong a ngangan: Tejima Kuniko, 1916 miheca 5 folad 20 romi'ad ‚Äď 2008 miheca 3 folad 1 romi'ad). Ikor no kararamod, itira sa i Lalauya niyaro' ko aro' tangasa 'ayaw picada no Komintang sifo to Taywan, madadoedo ci wawa to fa'inayan ci Wang Junli (1934), Wang Junxing (1938), Wang Juncheng (1940), Wang Zhimei (1943) 3 ko fa'inayan 1 ko fafahiyan a wawa. Ikor no picada no Komintang sifo to Taywan i, mapalinah ci Mo'e Peyongsi tayra i Alisan imengan a malaimeng ato mikapi to tayal to misokoliway. Ikor sato, malinah ci Mo'e Peyongsi tayra i Lalauya malaimeng, citodong mala singsi ato isingan ko tayal, nanoya malinah tayra i Ciayisienken imengci mala kakeridan misolapay; kaitiraan ningra a matayal i, padoedo ko kasofoc to wawa ci Wang Jungong (1945), Wang Yunmei (1948) aci Wang Huimeian. I 1952 mihecaan i, oya ca Mo'e Peyongsi, ci Uongu Yatauyogana, ci Yapasuyong Č Yulunana, ci Wu Yide, ci Du Xiaosheng aci Fang Yizhong mapakayra i "Goosanco fiedie panluanan" sanay ko pa'ilo, ikor mapakokot o nano Taywansen paoan silingpo kakeridan ci Lin Xiule o nano nisamawmawan patirengan a "Santi paoan huyi" sakapot i Ciayisi, mapolong mapatayra i Taypi Cinmi no sofitay a piliclican marofo. I 1954 miheca 2 folad 17 romi'ad, masetek ko pi'ilo; saka 4 folad 17 romi'ad, ca Mo'e Peyongsi, ci Uongu Yatauyogana, ci Yapasuyong Č Yulunana, ci Wu Yide, ci Du Xiaosheng aci Fang Yizhong maemin kowangan ko pipatay . ira ko~u * sa…ĺikaka to~u fa °inajan. ka…ĺakapańßan ni mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi o~una tajraaj i nano~u tajnank…ôn ¶iaji k…ôn ¶o~u a mataja…ĺ, ta itira ¶iŇčra i kak…ôri…¨~…ģan a mapa…ĺańßa…¨~…ģ. iko~ur sato~u, mino~ukaj ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi itira i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja nijaro~u °an im…ôŇčan a ma…ĺa misimawaj, iko~ur Ňča °aj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak mapa ¶akat a ma…ĺaim…ôŇč. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan itija, ¶iramo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tfo~uja ¶o~u~uana Ňčasaw nijaro~u °aj a fafańßijan ¶i (ko~uwapiŇč: waŇč *iŇč*ńßi, ¶o~uo~u~u a ŇčaŇčan ¶i jaŇčo~u~ui °…ô tiaki °ana, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a ŇčaŇčan: t…ôjima ko~u~uniko~u, **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ). iko~ur no~u kararamo~u…¨~…ģ, itira sa i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja nijaro~u ° ko~u aro~u ° taŇčasa °ajaw pi ¶a…¨~…ģa no~u ko~umintaŇč sifo~u to~u tajwan, ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ¶i wawa to~u fa °inajan ¶i waŇč *o~u~un…ĺi (****), waŇč *o~u~unxiŇč (****), waŇč *o~u~un ¶ńß…ôŇč (****), waŇč *ńßim…ôi (****) * ko~u fa °inajan * ko~u fafańßijan a wawa. iko~ur no~u pi ¶a…¨~…ģa no~u ko~umintaŇč sifo~u to~u tajwan i, mapa…ĺinańß ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi tajra i a…ĺisan im…ôŇčan a ma…ĺaim…ôŇč ato~u mikapi to~u taja…ĺ to~u miso~uko~u…ĺiwaj. iko~ur sato~u, ma…ĺinańß ¶i mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi tajra i …ĺa…ĺao~u~uja ma…ĺaim…ôŇč, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ma…ĺa siŇčsi ato~u isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, nano~uja ma…ĺinańß tajra i ¶iajisi…ônk…ôn im…ôŇč ¶i ma…ĺa kak…ôri…¨~…ģan miso~u…ĺapaj; kaitiraan niŇčra a mataja…ĺ i, pa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ko~u kaso~ufo~u ¶ to~u wawa ¶i waŇč *o~u~uŇčo~uŇč (****), waŇč jo~u~unm…ôi (****) a ¶i waŇč ńßo~u~uim…ôian. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan i, o~uja ¶a mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi, ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ¶i japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana, ¶i wo~u~u ji…¨~…ģ…ô, ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč a ¶i faŇč ji*ńßo~uŇč mapakajra i "*o~uo~usan ¶o~u fi…ô…¨~…ģi…ô pan…ĺo~u~uanan" sanaj ko~u pa °i…ĺo~u, iko~ur mapako~uko~ut o~u nano~u tajwans…ôn pao~uan si…ĺiŇčpo~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i …ĺin xio~u~u…ĺ…ô o~u nano~u nisamawmawan patir…ôŇčan a "santi pao~uan ńßo~u~uji" sakapo~ut i ¶iajisi, mapo~u…ĺo~uŇč mapatajra i tajpi ¶inmi no~u so~ufitaj a pi…ĺi ¶…ĺi ¶an maro~ufo~u. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mas…ôt…ôk ko~u pi °i…ĺo~u; saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ¶a mo~u °…ô p…ôjo~uŇčsi, ¶i o~u~uo~uŇčo~u~u jatao~u~ujo~u*ana, ¶i japaso~u~ujo~uŇč* jo~u~u…ĺo~u~unana, ¶i wo~u~u ji…¨~…ģ…ô, ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xiao~usńß…ôŇč a ¶i faŇč ji*ńßo~uŇč ma…ômin ko~uwaŇčan ko~u pipataj . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
